record.text:
#GlobalWarming #Climate #ClimateChange #Nature #Environment #Politics #Automotive #Automobiles

author.displayName: Harry Chemay

record.text:
Chatting with someone from Sydney recently who was complaining about the incessant 🌧 of recent years.

Didn't have the heart to tell them that greater precipitation for the northerly latitudes, and less for the southerly ones, is *exactly* what #climatechange models predicted years ago (Garnaut).

author.displayName: Eve Castle

record.text:
2024

endless summer
climate change horizon
      first-graders
can only play indoors
new band —the Rolling Blackouts

floods, tornadoes
hurricanes, oh my…
we dream over the rainbow
while emerald city burns
our pots of gold melt

#NaTankaMo first-grade #MayTanka #Tanka #climatechange #poetry

record.text: Decoupling seems to be the holy grail of #climateEconomics. There are 2 versions: relative decoupling means emissions rise less than #economicGrowth (the real grail). Absolute #decoupling means reducing emissions while growing the #economy. Both are insufficient with #climateChange!

external.description: The NOAA outlook predicts 17 to 25 tropical storms, eight to 13 hurricanes and four to seven “major” hurricanes, and is the most aggressive May prediction the agency has made.
external.title: This hurricane season could be among the worst in decades, NOAA warns

value.text: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration warned Thursday that the United States could face one of its worst hurricane seasons in two decades, predicting 17 to 25 tropical storms, eight to 13 hurricanes and four to seven “major” hurricanes.

external.title: This hurricane season could be among the worst in decades, NOAA warns

author.displayName: quick13

images.alt: option to add a “Matching of Undamaged Roof Surfacing” endorsement.  This endorsement will pay for the undamaged portion of your roof if only part of the roof is damaged from wind or hail.  This endorsement will only apply to asphalt shingle roofs that are 15 years or newer.  Also, your claim must exceed your deductible.

record.text: And there it is...State Farm just changed full replacement coverage of roof in annual renewal. I had 2 new roofs in 2 years thanks to baseball/golf ball sized hail.  Now its an additional charge for partial replacement to match existing roof. #ClimateChange #ClimateCrisis #mnwx #Insurance

images.alt: option to add a “Matching of Undamaged Roof Surfacing” endorsement.  This endorsement will pay for the undamaged portion of your roof if only part of the roof is damaged from wind or hail.  This endorsement will only apply to asphalt shingle roofs that are 15 years or newer.  Also, your claim must exceed your deductible.
